title: lobelia ceratophylla
intro: Lobelia ceratophylla, also known as waterfowl or water lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Lobelia ceratophylla include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Lobelia ceratophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
